de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt

Class BasicTask

  • java.lang.Object
    • javax.swing.tree.DefaultMutableTreeNode
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt.BasicTask
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TaskTreeNode, Serializable, Cloneable, MutableTreeNode, TreeNode

    public class BasicTask
extends DefaultMutableTreeNode
implements TaskTreeNode
    Captures a node in the TaskTree which contains exactly one proof. Such a node is the only one with a one to one mapping between TaskTreeNode and Proof. It may be a sub task of a more complex task such as ProofListTask.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Detail

      • BasicTask

        public BasicTask(ProofAggregate pl)
        creates a task with a single proof. The given proof list must contain exactly one proof.
